globalNotes.themeToggle: Use ?theme=light|dark query param first, fallback to /#/settings/theme UI toggle
globalNotes.selectorStrategy: ARIA/Label → Text content → CSS class/id fallback

finance.description: Invoices, Orders, Returns, Void Transaction, Expenses, Reports, Cash Drawer, Monthly Close
finance.dataRequirements: Most screens work with empty state; filled states need demo data seeded

shifts.description: Shifts list, Open Shift, Close Shift, Shift Summary
shifts.dataRequirements: Shift open/close flow depends on shift state
specialCases: Cannot close shift if none open

purchasesSuppliers.description: Purchase Form, Smart Reorder, AI Import, AI Review, Suppliers list/form/detail
purchasesSuppliers.dataRequirements: AI Review needs imported invoice data
specialCases: AI Invoice Review requires going through import flow first

marketingPromotions.description: Discounts, Coupons, Special Offers, Smart Promotions, Loyalty Program
marketingPromotions.dataRequirements: Empty state is valid for all

infrastructure.description: Notifications, Print Queue, Sync Status, Pending Transactions, Conflict Resolution, Drivers, Branches

settings.description: All settings sub-screens (store, POS, printer, language, theme, payment, barcode, receipt, tax, discounts, interest, security, users, roles, activity log, backup, notifications, ZATCA, help)
